title: Comment insérer de l’azote dans les systèmes de culture ?
subtitle: Webinaire du Mardi 6 juillet 2021, 10 h–12 h 15
description: A webinar guide to integrating nitrogen into cropping systems through alternatives to mineral fertilizers, including legume symbiosis, cover crops and mechanical weeding. It presents R&D results, farmer feedback and practical recommendations from the GO PROTEINS project in Bourgogne-Franche-Comté.
